hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams review and route Travel Rule messages with missing or incomplete data by linking exceptions, cases, wallets and audit evidence into one workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule exceptions slow down reviews
problem_description: Incomplete originator or beneficiary data delays timely assessment and resolution of Travel Rule exceptions. Compliance teams face fragmented workflows and weak audit trails, making it harder to maintain clear evidence and consistent case handling.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY combines originator and beneficiary data, routing status, exceptions and case actions into one audit-ready workflow so compliance teams can resolve Travel Rule exceptions efficiently and with clarity.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY tracks incomplete or failed Travel Rule messages through exception handling, case creation, review, evidence preservation and prepares regulatory reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond message routing. Evidence-ready Travel Rule workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms incomplete Travel Rule data and provider outputs into structured cases, audit evidence, and operational workflows without replacing existing Travel Rule solutions.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing Travel Rule exceptions by preserving audit evidence and enabling provider integration within secure, enterprise-grade compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into one structured compliance workflow for VASPs and digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle incomplete Travel Rule data?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes incomplete or missing Travel Rule data into exception cases for manual review, supporting all originator and beneficiary details are verified and remediated within the compliance workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by logging decision records, case histories and supporting data related to Travel Rule message reviews and exception handling.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers, aggregating their outputs into a connected workflow without requiring provider replacement or disrupting existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule exception reviews with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects incomplete Travel Rule messages, cases, wallet data and audit evidence into one controlled compliance workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
